subject_line: Nexthop AI just raised $500M — I've built GTM from zero before
email_body:
Hi Jigar,

I saw Nexthop AI just closed its Series B ($500M). Congrats — that's the moment where GTM becomes the bottleneck.

I've built GTM engines from scratch. At deco.cx I was the first sales hire — took it from $0 to $1.5M+ ARR, built a 30+ partner ecosystem, and sold AI to enterprises. Before that, I founded and exited my own company after 12 years ($10M+ revenue).

I built a system that tracks AI funding rounds and identifies companies hiring for sales — that's how I found you. It's the same "build the machine" thinking I bring to GTM.

Worth a 15-min call this week?

Leandro
followup_body:
Hi Jigar,

Quick follow-up on my note last week. I've been following the artificial intelligence space closely and Nexthop AI's approach stands out.

The companies that win post-funding are the ones that nail GTM early. I've done it twice — once as a founder (12-year exit) and once as first GTM hire at an AI company.

Happy to share specifics on how I built the sales motion at deco.cx. 15 minutes?

subject_line: Anthropic's Series G — I've scaled AI startups from $0 to $1.5M ARR
email_body:
Hi Natalie,

Congrats on Anthropic's Series G ($30.0B) last month. You're probably deep in scaling mode right now.

I noticed you're hiring 97 sales roles including Finance Analytics & Business Intelligence. I've built GTM engines from scratch. At deco.cx I was the first sales hire — took it from $0 to $1.5M+ ARR, built a 30+ partner ecosystem, and sold AI to enterprises. Before that, I founded and exited my own company after 12 years ($10M+ revenue).

I built a system that tracks AI funding rounds and identifies companies hiring for sales — that's how I found you. It's the same "build the machine" thinking I bring to GTM.

Worth a 15-min call this week?

Leandro

Hi Natalie,

Quick follow-up on my note last week. I've been following the enterprise space closely and Anthropic's approach stands out.

The companies that win post-funding are the ones that nail GTM early. I've done it twice — once as a founder (12-year exit) and once as first GTM hire at an AI company.

Happy to share specifics on how I built the sales motion at deco.cx. 15 minutes?
